title: AutoIndex Schema Validation Errors
summary: Schema validation failures in commands.jsonl preventing automatic index updates - inputs.3.type and outputs type validation errors
impact: Documentation system cannot auto-update index.md from index.jsonl
error_details: Schema validation failed: inputs.3.type integer not in allowed types, outputs.0.type array not in allowed types, outputs.1.type integer not in allowed types
workaround: Manual index updates working but automated processes failing

title: Documentation Library Index Integration
summary: New documentation files in system_docs/ and public_docs/ not appearing in auto-generated index.md
impact: New documentation not discoverable through main index
error_details: Manual entries added to index.jsonl but not reflected in index.md regeneration

title: Service Registration/Proxy Routing Disconnect
summary: register_user_service creates service in registry but supervisor config doesn't sync, public proxy returns 521 while localhost works
impact: Service recovery blocked - n5-waitlist unreachable via public URL
error_details: Service svc_2dZ4pptbM5o port 50529: localhost=200, public=521. Requires Zo team intervention.
